description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive curved magazine and a wooden stock and handguard, reminiscent of the AK-47 design. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The wooden components have a rich, reddish-brown grain, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock, a standard-length barrel, and traditional iron sights mounted on top. The magazine is a detachable, curved box type, typical for this style of rifle. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in various urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the barrel end, front sight, and a narrow profile of the wooden stock.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
